Related Entities

  • hospital BRONSON BATTLE CREEK HOSPITAL 4-star overall rating
  • hospital BATTLE CREEK VA MEDICAL CENTER
  • hospital OAKLAWN HOSPITAL 4-star overall rating
  • hospital BRONSON BEHAVIORAL HEALTH HOSPITAL
  • snf Majestic Care of Battle Creek 2-star, 65 beds
  • snf Evergreen Manor Senior Care Center 4-star, 91 beds
  • snf Marshall Nursing and Rehabilitation Community 1-star, 60 beds
  • snf Calhoun County Medical Care Facility 2-star, 120 beds

  • snf The Oaks at Battle Creek 4-star, 77 beds

  • snf Pinnacle Care of Battle Creek 1-star, 82 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026) CDC SDOH Measures for County (2017-2021)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
